messages.body: Scope correction: stop broad verification. Own only the mobile Wells layout fix in DesignWellsView.tsx, useViewportLayout.ts, and only narrow SlopcastPage.tsx caller changes if required. Goal: 390x844 Wells on 127.0.0.1:3100 in Slate and Classic must use the intended mobile flow with no clipped header, no desktop split rail dominating the viewport, and no white gutter. Commit when done and report exact files changed.
